//: Recurring data jobs for ops/harvest/runner.mjs. every: day|week|month|once. Commands run from the repo root with .env.local via each job's own --env-file. Set "disabled": true to park a job without deleting it. MRF manifests don't go here — drop them in .harvest/mrf/manifests/queue/ instead.

jobs.memo: Read-only morning coverage report — the log is the deliverable.
Discover, download, and apply the CMS weekly NPPES delta + deactivations. nppes-sync.mjs skips already-applied files, so re-running is free.
Read-only capability probe (<=2 GETs per payer) — keeps payer_sources.last_probe_result honest.
